rationale: Write concern validator rejects 'majority' and tag sets, which are valid per write concern spec.
Collation spec requires MUST throw error when maxWireVersion < 5; driver silently ignores collation instead.
Aggregate doesn't apply collection read/write concern; spec requires inheriting concern from collection for write operations.
Documentation typo (semicolon vs comma in BCON example); no driver behavior or spec involved.
Memory leak regression in aggregate from CDRIVER-1704 fix; implementation resource management, not a spec rule violation.
Documentation improvement about writeConcernError return behavior; no spec compliance issue.
Spec explicitly says ReadConcern MUST NOT be applied automatically to generic RunCommand; driver applies it anyway.
Adding address sanitizer to CI; testing infrastructure improvement with no spec behavior involved.
Memory leaks in create_index_with_opts detected by valgrind; resource management bug, no spec rule violated.
Memory leak in mongoc_client_new on failure path; implementation resource management, not a spec deviation.
cursor_set_hint sets slaveOK bit unconditionally; via mongos this changes read preference to secondaryPreferred unexpectedly.
Error message wording improvement for clarity; no spec behavior involved.
Aggregate sends unsupported batchSize to MongoDB 2.4; regression/compatibility issue, no explicit spec rule cited.
Documentation rename from get_hint to get_server_id; docs-only fix with no behavior change.
macOS SSL certificate API quirk; internal TLS implementation detail, no spec rule violated.
Documentation improvement clarifying that opts functions copy their inputs; no driver behavior change.
Collation spec MUST throw error when server lacks read command support; find_with_opts silently passes $collation instead.
write_command_with_opts ignores default_wc and default_rc; spec requires inheriting defaults when not explicitly provided.
JSON-to-BSON conversion narrows negative int64 to int32; BSON spec defines int64 range check must include INT32_MIN.
Removing AM_MAINTAINER_MODE from autoconf build system; build infrastructure change only.
Memory leaks in test code for CDRIVER-1412 fix; test resource management, no spec involvement.
Update performance benchmark test data files to new published format; performance tooling, no spec involvement.
Allow APM callbacks to be reassigned; API enhancement for PHPC/HHVM request lifecycle, not a spec compliance issue.
pthread_create return value not checked; implementation robustness bug, no spec rule violated.
localThresholdMS compared in wrong units (microseconds vs milliseconds); server selection spec defines it in milliseconds.
Server selection spec MUST NOT set slaveOK for primary reads; cursor_set_hint sets it unconditionally even for primaries.
make distcheck fails due to missing doc build rule; build system issue only.
make dist improvement to auto-build HTML/man docs; build system enhancement only.
SDAM spec says RTT must be set to null when server transitions to Unknown; driver records 0 instead.
Deprecating legacy mongoc_collection_find in favor of find_with_opts; API deprecation, no spec compliance issue.
Null pointer crash in deprecated kill_cursor when APM callback registered; implementation bug in deprecated code path.
Expose Infinity/NaN constants from bson_decimal128_to_string as public API; API improvement, not a spec deviation.
Coverity static analysis dead code warning in example file; no driver behavior or spec involved.
Coverity unreachable code in handshake OS detection; static analysis cleanup, no spec behavior involved.
Server selection spec uses -1 as sentinel for no maxStalenessMS; driver used 0 which conflicts with valid staleness value.
Coverity out-of-bounds write in example code (malloc without +1 for null); static analysis bug in example only.
Coverity null dereference warning in topology description handler; static analysis cleanup, no spec rule violated.
AddressSanitizer global buffer overflow in JSON test code; memory safety bug, no spec behavior involved.
BSON Extended JSON spec requires $code/$scope attributes for Code type; libbson omits them; PyMongo cited as reference.
Internal mutex locking cleanup in topology scanner callback; code quality refactor, no spec behavior change.
Documentation example has undefined variable and typo; docs-only bug with no driver behavior involved.
32-bit integer overflow in internal BSON memory allocation; implementation bug with no contradicted spec rule.
BSON spec requires DBPointer collection name to be null-terminated string; libbson skips the null byte verification.
BSON spec defines boolean true as 0x01 only; libbson accepts any non-zero value and bson_validate does not catch it.
Wrong C type (bool return used as uint64_t) and assignment-in-assert bugs in GridFS extend; implementation bugs, not spec rule violations.
Compiler error from macro returning wrong type (NULL vs bool); C type system fix, no spec behavior involved.
Build failure on big-endian zSeries due to unused function warning; platform build issue, no spec involvement.
bson_ascii_strtoll never sets ERANGE; error detection gap in JSON parser, no specific BSON spec rule names this requirement.
cursor_new_from_command_reply fails on static bson_t; internal BSON ownership semantics bug, not a spec deviation.
Manpage filenames don't match function names; documentation packaging issue, no spec behavior involved.
